findings.evidence: Lines 266-277 use only `subgroupFiberOrbitClass_eq_iff`, an orbit witness, and `IsCancelSMul.right_cancel`; `OrbitRelQuotient.lean` already contains generic `MulAction.orbitRel.Quotient` API such as `orbitRelQuotientBot_mk_eq_iff` and `orbitRelQuotientMapOfLE_bot_eq_iff`.
findings.fix: Prove a generic lemma in `TauCeti/Algebra/GroupAction/OrbitRelQuotient.lean`, e.g. `(Quotient.mk'' (g • x) : MulAction.orbitRel.Quotient H X) = Quotient.mk'' x ↔ g ∈ H` under `[Group G] [MulAction G X] [IsCancelSMul G X]`, then derive the deck and covering wrappers from it.
findings.issue: `subgroupFiberOrbitClass_smul_eq_base_iff` and its wrapper at line 282 specialize a generic orbit-quotient criterion to `Deck p`/fibres; the proof only uses `MulAction.orbitRel` via `subgroupFiberOrbitClass_eq_iff` and `IsCancelSMul`.

summary: The normalizer quotient comparison has been moved to the right algebraic level, but the new base-orbit criterion is still stated only for deck fibres despite being a generic cancellative action fact.
